name: Fun Spot America Theme Parks
city:
Orlando, Florida

Kissimmee, Florida

Fayetteville, Georgia

United States
description: Fun Spot America Theme Parks is a group of amusement parks.  Since 1979, the group has owned and operated a number of small amusement parks over the years and currently has three locations in Orlando, Florida; Kissimmee, Florida; and Fayetteville, Georgia.
